mapper.sql:
/* wms-outbound-obmoveob-sql-oracle.xml - selectMoveObDtSql - 이고 출고 - 출고 상세정보 조회 sql */ SELECT OBHD.CTKEY , OBHD.OWKEY , OBHD.OBORDKEY /*오더 코드*/ , OBHD.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈 코드*/ , OBDT.OBORDDTKEY /*오더 상세 코드*/ , MCDT.CNTRBARCODE /*용기 바코드*/ , MCDT.ICKEY /*상품 코드*/ , MCDT.IVATKEY /*재고 속성 코드*/ , MCDT.UOM /*단위*/ , MCDT.QTY /*수량*/ , MCDT.INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , MCDT.INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , MCDT.UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ , MCDT.UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , MC.MVOBGRPNO /*이고 그룹 번호*/ , MC.CNFRMYN /*확정 여부*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OBHD /*출고 공통 정보*/ INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OBDT /*출고 상세 정보*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = OBDT.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = OBDT.OWKEY AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = OBDT.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_MVOB_CNTR_DT MCDT /*이고 용기 상세 정보*/ ON OBDT.CTKEY = MCDT.CTKEY AND OBDT.OWKEY = MCDT.OWKEY AND OBDT.OBHDKEY = MCDT.OBHDKEY AND OBDT.OBDTKEY = MCDT.OBDTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_MVOB_CNTR MC /*이고 용기 정보*/ ON MCDT.CTKEY = MC.CTKEY AND MCDT.OWKEY = MC.OWKEY AND MCDT.OBHDKEY = MC.OBHDKEY AND MCDT.CNTRBARCODE = MC.CNTRBARCODE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC /*상품 마스터*/ ON MCDT.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND MCDT.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND MCDT.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY WHERE OBHD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OBHD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OBHD.OBORDKEY = #{obordkey} AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND MC.MVOBGRPNO = #{mvobgrpno} AND OBHD.CNTRWKCOMPLYN = 'Y' AND MC.CNTRDDLNYN = 'Y'
#{cond}
mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obConfirmManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectContainerListByMoveOutboundGroupNo - 이고출고확정 대상 용기 LIST 조회 */ SELECT MC.CTKEY ,MC.OWKEY ,MC.OBHDKEY ,MC.CNTRBARCODE ,MC.MVOBGRPNO ,OBHD.ORHDKEY ,OBHD.OBSTATUSCD FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OBHD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_MVOB_CNTR MC /*이고 용기 정보*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = MC.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = MC.OWKEY AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = MC.OBHDKEY WHERE OBHD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OBHD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND MC.MVOBGRPNO = #{mvobgrpno} AND MC.CNFRMYN = #{cnfrmyn} AND MC.CNTRDDLNYN = 'Y' AND OBHD.CNTRWKCOMPLYN = 'Y' ORDER BY MC.OBHDKEY, MC.CNTRBARCODE
